responsibilities: Associate Principal, Global Drug Development Consulting & Expertise Centre Role Overview The Global Drug Development Consulting & Expertise Centre Lead is a senior leadership role responsible for building and scaling a global consulting capability from India, while delivering high-impact client engagements across the drug development value chain. This role sits at the intersection of: End-to-end consulting project delivery and client Deep Drug Development domain expertise Knowledge services and global capability building The Consulting & Expertise Centre Lead will act as a trusted advisor to senior R&D leaders, a builder of teams and offerings, and a key contributor to practice growth, working closely with Principals and Partners across regions. What You’ll Do: Client Leadership & Consulting Delivery Lead complex, multi-workstream consulting engagements across Clinical Development, Regulatory and Pharmacovigilance Serve as a client partner to senior Director-, VP-, and C-suite–level stakeholders within global R&D organizations Interpret client needs and problem statements, understanding complex challenges in context and helping to interpret business and technology requirements Deliver solutions, translating strategy into executable roadmaps and produce high-quality outputs that exactly meet client needs Ensure high-quality delivery excellence across strategy, operating model design, process transformation, system-enabled change, system implementations, data initiatives, AI initiatives Represent ZS as a thought leader in client discussions, workshops, and executive forums Practice & Capability Building Growing R&D consulting capability in India, expanding and leading the team of practitioners, engaging with senior clients and principals across the practice Growing and leading our team of deep experts with scientific, domain, functional, standards, regulations expertise across life sciences industry and collaborative initiatives initiative Collaborating to increase the value and impact of our knowledge services and industry research capability Develop and mentor high-performing teams across consulting, analytics, and domain experts Establish delivery standards, reusable assets, playbooks, and best practices across Drug Development Act as a local leader in India for the Drug Development consulting, expert and knowledge capability, working closely with global practice leadership Balance utilization, quality, and scalability to support sustainable growth of the practice Business Development & Growth Identify new client opportunities and expand existing accounts through trusted relationships and collaboration with global drug development leads Lead proposal development, including RFP responses, proactive value propositions, detailed solutioning, and commercial considerations – in close collaboration with global drug development leads Partner with Principals and Partners to shape new offerings aligned to evolving R&D and clinical innovation trends Contribute to long-term practice strategy, investment priorities, talent planning, location strategy and global ways of working Thought Leadership & Market Impact Develop internal and external thought leadership on topics such as: Future of Clinical Development and Clinical Trials R&D Operating Model Transformation Regulatory Evolution Digital, Analytics, Platform and AI enablement across R&D Contribute to white papers, points of view, and conference presentations Stay at the forefront of regulatory, technology, and operating model changes in global Drug Development What You’ll Bring: Advanced degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Medicine, Engineering, or related field (MBA or equivalent preferred) 15+ years of experience across Drug Development, R&D consulting, or life sciences transformation roles Strong domain expertise across one or more of: Clinical Development Regulatory Affairs Pharmacovigilance / Drug Safety R&D Operations Proven experience leading large-scale consulting or transformation programs with global teams and global clients Demonstrated ability to build and lead high-performing teams, multi-disciplinary teams with high degrees of co-ordination and collaboration Strong client presence with experience influencing senior stakeholders Prior experience in top-tier consulting or global life sciences organizations Experience with R&D technology platforms (e.g., Veeva, Oracle, Medidata, AWS, ECS) Background in operating model design, process harmonization, and change management and proven results to create value for clients Experience working in or building global delivery / offshore consulting models with a clear point of view on how to optimize this model for both the client and the company Track record of business development and account growth understanding sales processes, pipeline management, pricing excellence Executive-level communication and storytelling with high attention to detail, messaging and tailoring to audience Ability to operate at both strategic and hands-on levels, unafraid to roll sleeves up People-first leader with a coaching mindset, with progressive techniques, high priority on inclusion and creating a sense of belonging on the team High ownership, entrepreneurial mindset, and bias for impact whilst solving for both the client and the company

description: description
responsibilities: As a Delivery Excellence Specialist at ZS Associates, you will be responsible for driving delivery excellence by ensuring that delivery processes are executed with precision, consistency, and alignment to organizational standards. You will provide strategic and technical guidance to delivery teams, enabling them to implement and sustain high-performing controls and practices that support delivery efficiency and continuous improvement. By collaborating with key stakeholders—including Delivery Managers and Leaders - you will help deliver a comprehensive view of delivery health, performance metrics, and their impact on business outcomes. Your advanced knowledge of delivery management principles and project execution will empower you to lead innovative initiatives, optimize delivery frameworks, and manage a diverse team in a dynamic and evolving technology landscape. What You'll Do: Work closely with delivery teams to embed best practices in delivery excellence, risk management, ensuring successful outcomes for aligned programs Track and report operational KPIs to support data-driven decision-making. Monitor delivery performance metrics and escalate issues to ensure timely resolution Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive continuous improvement in delivery practices. Conduct process reviews and identify inefficiencies, recommending actionable improvements. Assist in designing and implementing process improvement initiatives using Lean, Six Sigma, or Agile methodologies. Identify operational bottlenecks and support initiatives to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. Participate in change management initiatives by supporting communication, training, and stakeholder engagement activities. Help assess the impact of changes and gather feedback to refine implementation strategies. Promote adoption of new tools, processes, and systems across teams. Perform periodic project audits / reviews for the project delivery process based on CMMI (Capability Maturity Model Integration) process areas and report non compliances, best practices followed Assist in Delivery Risk governance and work closely with QRM Leads ensuring effective risk management and mitigation throughout lifecycle of projects Conduct trainings on Delivery Excellence focus areas, QMS process assets and awareness on best practices Maintain and ensure project process maturity (CMMI Level 3) adherence for ensuring Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) v3.0 Development & Services appraisal and accreditation process Showcase expertise on Software Quality Management framework such as ISO9001, CMMI Development, CMMI Services and focus on performance and continuous improvement at project as well as organization level Enhance Delivery and Operations maturity through close engagement and planned intervention across all project phases Definition and regular enhancement of enterprise level Quality Management System aka Enterprise Delivery Framework (EDF) supporting Development (Waterfall, Agile) as well as Operations projects (Services delivery methodology. What You'll Bring: Bachelor's degree in IT or relevant field with a strong academic record. A minimum of 7-10 years of experience in Delivery Excellence and Quality Management Strong communication & strategic influencing skills. Relevant experience working with senior leaders, building internal networks, and delivering high impact programs in complex -matrixed environments. Formal training or certification in Delivery/Operations excellence, and/or 5+ years of experience or equivalent expertise in technology Delivery excellence management, Operations excellence, Software Quality Management & Software Quality Standards or related field. Familiarity with delivery excellence frameworks, industry standards, and pharma regulatory requirements (HIPPA, GXP etc) Proficient knowledge and expertise in data security, risk assessment & reporting, control evaluation, design, and governance, with a proven record of implementing effective risk mitigation strategies. Proficient in MS Office productivity suite (e.g., Word, Excel, PowerPoint, SharePoint). Advanced Excel skills strongly preferred Six Sigma Black Belt/ITIL/CMMI/ISO9001 Lead auditor/MBA or relevant Delivery excellence / Audit certification Experience with Project management tools (e.g., Atlassian JIRA, Confluence, MS Project) and Quality Assurance tools CMMI implementation experience (Maturity level 3 at minimum/ High maturity implementation experience preferred ) Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, for reporting and interacting with stakeholders. Ability to work independently and as part of a team Willingness to adapt to evolving industry standards and technologies Ability to manage a wide variety of tasks and meet deadlines, and reliability/dependability Proven ability to work creatively and analytically in a problem-solving environment Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach How you’ll grow: Cross-functional skills development & custom learning pathways Milestone training programs aligned to career progression opportunities Internal mobility paths that empower growth via s-curves, individual contribution and role expansions Hybrid working model: ZS is committed to a Flexible and Connected way of working. ZSers are onsite at clients or ZS offices three days a week. Combined flexibility to work remotely two days a week is also available. The magic of ZS culture and innovation thrives in both planned and spontaneous face-to-face connections

description: description
responsibilities: Insights & Analytics ZS's Insights & Analytics group partners with clients to design and deliver solutions to help them tackle a broad range of business challenges. Our teams work on multiple projects simultaneously, leveraging advanced data analytics and problem-solving techniques. Our recommendations and solutions are based on rigorous research and analysis underpinned by deep expertise and thought leadership.    Discovery - Medical & Scientific Expertise Center   We help clients reinvent pharma discovery, elucidate disease biology, innovate novel therapeutics and accelerate drug development to create breakthrough science and increase the probability of R&D success and patient outcomes. We’re passionate about accelerating transformation in research and early development so clients can build capabilities in programmable biology across therapeutic modalities. Our integrated approach is multidisciplinary and led by science. What You’ll Do Engaging with clients and ZS teams to comprehend and articulate scientific questions, translating them into actionable insights and analyses. Applying a scientific mindset to identify and test hypotheses, drawing on extensive experience in wet lab experimentation and protocol development. Utilizing in-depth knowledge of data, systems, process flows, and procedures to provide analyses and recommendations on client projects. Demonstrating a profound understanding of the drug discovery process, pre-clinical studies, animal models, and related areas. Serving as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) in technology projects focused on scientific research, data analysis, and computational biology. Contributing to the development of tools and platforms that confer sustained competitive advantage to ZS in scientific consulting and research studies. Collaborating with technology team in building research platforms, research data models, and data lakes. Synthesizing findings, formulating recommendations, and effectively communicating results to clients and internal teams. Fluency in English with a client-first mentality Intense work ethic which requires collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach Guide and mentor Associates on teams. What You’ll Bring Engaging with clients and ZS teams to comprehend and articulate scientific questions, translating them into actionable insights and analyses. Applying a scientific mindset to identify and test hypotheses, drawing on extensive experience in wet lab experimentation and protocol development. Utilizing in-depth knowledge of data, systems, process flows, and procedures to provide analyses and recommendations on client projects. Demonstrating a profound understanding of the drug discovery process, pre-clinical studies, animal models, and related areas. Serving as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) in technology projects focused on scientific research, data analysis, and computational biology. Contributing to the development of tools and platforms that confer sustained competitive advantage to ZS in scientific consulting and research studies. Collaborating with technology team in building research platforms, research data models, and data lakes. Synthesizing findings, formulating recommendations, and effectively communicating results to clients and internal teams

role: Lead R&D Technologist - Clinical Business Analyst (Clinical Data Solutions)
description: description
responsibilities: About ZS R&D (Life Sciences) ZS life science R&D team partners with clients to discover and develop innovative medicines that improve patient's lives. Our work spans consulting, analytics and technology (services and platforms) projects across the several domains. We have 3500+ zs professionals that deliver R&D programs, $100MM+ invested in R&D data, analytics and technology assets and 100+ clients on R&D programs. About the Expertise Centre – R&D Technologist The R&D Technologist Expertise Centre within ZS’s Drug Development practice partners with biopharma organizations to design and deliver innovative clinical data solutions that accelerate drug development and reduce risk from portfolio to patient. The team operates at the intersection of key ZS drug development verticals—including asset strategy, clinical trial design, clinical data management, statistical programming, regulatory, and risk-based quality. By combining deep clinical domain expertise, data standards, clinical programming, systems understanding, and consulting discipline, the team solves complex R&D challenges with speed, scale, and measurable impact. What You’ll Do: Business Analysis Leadership & Agile Delivery Lead BA activities within Agile teams (Scrum / SAFe / Kanban) and act as the primary requirements owner for assigned workstreams. Drive discovery: plan and facilitate workshops, stakeholder interviews, and requirement walkthroughs with clinical, biometrics, data management, and technology teams. Convert complex clinical and business needs into clear deliverables (epics, features, user stories, acceptance criteria) with strong testability and traceability (RTM). Partner with Product Owners to shape the backlog (prioritization, refinement, scope management) and support sprint ceremonies (planning, reviews, retrospectives). Identify risks, dependencies, and gaps early; propose options and recommendations, and support timely decision-making. Mentor Associate Consultants / BAs on best practices for story writing, requirement quality, and stakeholder management. Clinical Data Hub & Repository Programs Lead requirements and solution definition for clinical data hubs/repositories, including source onboarding (EDC, Labs, eCOA, Imaging, Safety) and downstream consumption. Define data ingestion, mapping, transformation, reconciliation, and access-control requirements; ensure alignment with data governance expectations. Collaborate with architects/engineering to validate data flows, metadata strategy, and quality controls in GxP-compliant environments. Support UAT strategy, test scenario design, defect triage, and release readiness for repository/platform deployments. Clinical Data Products & AI-Driven Automation Own functional requirements for clinical data products and automation initiatives (e.g., SDTM/ADaM enablement, mapping accelerators, automated checks, reusable analytics components). Translate clinical/biometrics needs into automation use cases, ensure measurable acceptance criteria, and align stakeholders on expected outcomes. Work with data science/engineering teams to define training/validation datasets, quality thresholds, and operational workflows (human-in-the-loop, auditability). Statistical & risk based clinical data review Lead requirement definition for centralized/statistical monitoring solutions, including metrics, signals, dashboards, reports, and operational workflows for study oversight. Partner with statisticians, clinical operations, and quality stakeholders to ensure monitoring logic is transparent, testable, and fit for purpose. Stakeholder Collaboration & Delivery Management Serve as the day-to-day BA lead for client and internal stakeholders; manage expectations and ensure clarity of scope, decisions, and documentation. Coordinate with Engineering, AI, CDM, and Product teams to ensure requirements are feasible, complete, and aligned to target architecture. Maintain high-quality project artefacts (BRD/FRD, user stories, process flows, data flows, traceability, release notes) and support audits as needed What You’ll Bring: Experience & Domain Expertise Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Life Sciences, Pharmacy, Statistics, Data Science, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. 7 – 12 years of experience in Life Sciences R&D Understanding of the end-to-end drug development lifecycle Strong domain knowledge in life sciences in either of the following domain: discovery/pre-clinical, clinical, regulatory Proven experience leading requirements end-to-end in Agile delivery (story mapping, backlog management, sprint execution support). Excellent communication, facilitation, and stakeholder management skills. Clinical Systems & Platforms Good to have Experience working with: EDC Platforms: Medidata Rave, Veeva EDC, Oracle InForm Clinical Systems: ePRO, laboratory systems, CTMS, eTMF, CDMS Clinical Data Repositories: SAS LSAF, Oracle LSH, eClinical Elluminate Metadata Repositories: Nurocor, Sycamore, Formedix Statistical Computing: SAS, SAS Viya, Domino Data Standards & Interoperability Good to have Expertise in: CDISC: CDASH, SDTM, ADaM, TLF Interoperability: FHIR, HL7, USDM Technical & Analytical Skills Good to have: Working knowledge of R, Python, and SASfor clinical data transformation and analysis Exposure to AI/ML and GenAI-based solutionsin clinical data and analytics Strong capability in business process modeling, data flow modeling, and solution architecture desig

description: description
responsibilities: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant Imagine shaping how a global consulting and tech firm is seen across India. Turning stories into headlines, building connections with media, and making our leaders the go-to voices in tech. Join our Marketing & Communications team in Gurugram as we strengthen our position as a global tech partner and employer of choice in the India region. What you'll do: Media and Analyst Relations Associate Consultant in the Enterprise will… Craft and execute media strategies: Plan, organize, and execute a comprehensive media strategy for the India region Create compelling content: Write press releases, thought leadership opinion pieces, media interview briefs, and reactive statements for external and internal use Drive PR campaigns: Partner with external agencies and internal leaders to run high-impact initiatives Build media connections: Forge lasting relationship with media and analyst, handle their queries, and keep our story front and center Measure and optimize impact: Track and report on the effectiveness of media and analyst relations strategies, using metrics and KPIs to assess impact and alignment with strategic goals Stay ahead of the curve: Monitor competitor’s news and spot opportunities to outpace them Prepare for anything: Develop crisis management plan in case of any negative fallout affecting the firm's image Industry awards: Lead awards submissions and amplify wins to elevate ZS across India What you'll bring: Minimum bachelor’s degree in communication, journalism or related field; master’s degree (MA/MS/MBA) preferred 6+ years in media relations at a multinational firm, with hands-on wins in PR campaigns Excellent writing, editing and verbal communications skills Demonstrated ability to manage internal client relationships, including senior leaders Proven record in managing public relations programs that achieve results Ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously with strong prioritization skills Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and a passion for delivering top-quality work Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approac

description: description
responsibilities: About Advanced Data Science (ADS): ZS’s Advanced Data Science group is focused on creating practical impact for clients across various industries such as Healthcare and Bio-Tech, Hi-Tech & Telecommunication, Financial Services and Travel through advanced analytics and emerging data sources. Emerging datasets include both unstructured datasets (for example, text, voice, image, etc.) and semi-structured datasets (for example, patientlevel records). Advanced analytical techniques span a range of innovative machine learning, artificial intelligence, advanced statistics and optimization approaches. Being part of the ADS group at ZS will be an opportunity for you to work on cutting-edge solutions, utilizing new age data sources to shape innovations across multiple areas, for our clients and the broader ZS community. A key enabler of our services is leveraging data in delivering client solutions. The data available about customers is getting richer and the problems that our customers are trying to answer continue to evolve. In our endeavor to stay ahead in providing solutions to these evolving complex problems, ZS has set up an Advanced Data Science which has three major focus areas: Research the evolving datasets and advanced analytical techniques to develop new offerings/solutions Deliver client impact by collaboratively implementing these solutions Provide thought leadership by developing the ZS Point of View in this space Data Science Managers (DSMs) design, develop and execute analytic techniques on large, complex, structured and unstructured data sets (including big data) to help clients make better fact-based decisions. DSMs will develop new offerings/solutions, drive client impact by delivering client solutions and shape the ZS point of view in this space. You will be responsible for applying analytical techniques to model complex business problems, uncovering insights, and identifying opportunities using statistical, algorithmic, mining, and visualization techniques. What You’ll Do: Lead and mentor a team of data scientists, providing guidance and support to ensure the successful execution of client projects. Develop and implement data science strategies that align with the overall goals of the AI team and the organization. Drive business and strategy development through project delivery and client relationship management; Develop/sell new business opportunities Direct multiple projects simultaneously, honing analytic and project management skills; Play a key role in development of data science capabilities and offerings that create scale and advance our analytic platform; Motivate, coach and serve as a role model for project team members Provide thought leadership and innovation through research and publication. What You’ll Bring: PhD degree in Computer Science, Statistics or related discipline; 8+ years of relevant post-collegiate work experience; in lieu of a PhD, 10+ years of work experience may substitute. Experience with big data, claims analytics, advanced analytics concepts and algorithms (e.g. text mining, social listening, recommender systems, predictive modeling, Gen AI, proficiency with large language models etc.); Relevant programming background (e.g. Python/R); Strong understanding of relevant tools/platforms (e.g. cloud platforms such AWS/Azure); Proven track record of business development Agile project planning and project management experience; Team management and skill development experience; Relevant domain knowledge preferred; (healthcare, pharma); Excellent oral and written communication skills; Strong attention to detail, with a research-focused mindset; Excellent critical thinking and problem solving skills

role: Business Technology Solutions Consultant - Data Engineer
description: description
responsibilities: ZS’s Business Technology Solutions team is responsible to lead end to end responsibility of project across all phases i.e. discovery, requirements gathering, design, implementation, testing and operations. This team seeks opportunity to undertake diverse tech roles and foster continuous innovation which benefits the individual’s professional growth and bring the best in delivering world class technology solutions. In addition, this team configures ZS’s proprietary software used to streamline business processes for commercial groups at client organizations. This team takes overall ownership of the solution delivery, managing operations services, client stakeholder management, contribute to business development and selling activities, project planning and team management. What you’ll do: Lead the team consisting of Specialist, Developer, Operator, etc. to solve the business problems and lead end to end delivery; Ownership to ensure the proposed design, deliverables meet the client’s expectations and solves the business problem with high degree of quality; Translate complex client expectations and business problem into technical requirements. Own end to end responsibility to lead project across all phases – right from discovery/ POC to managing operations; Lead one or more project at a time, based on the role and time commitment required for the project; Partner with Senior Leadership team and assist in project management responsibility i.e. Project planning, staffing management, people growth, etc.; Work in tandem with global counterparts in planning and accomplishing planned activities, identification or risks and mitigation strategy; Build relationship with client stakeholders and lead presentations related to project deliverables, design brainstorming / discussion, status updates, innovation/ improvements, etc.; Collaborate with other ZS internal expertise teams - Architects, Validation/ testing, etc. to ensure best in class technology solution; Outlook for continuous improvement, innovation and provide necessary mentorship and guidance to the team; Liaison with Staffing partner, HR business partners for team building/ planning; Assist Senior Leadership on building POV on new technology or problem solving, Innovation to build firm intellectual capital: Actively lead unstructured problem solving to design and build complex solutions, tune to meet expected performance and functional requirements.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Bachelor's/Master's degree with specialization in Computer Science, MIS, IT or other computer related disciplines. 6-8 years of relevant consulting-industry experience working on medium-large-scale technology solution delivery engagements. 5+ years of hands-on experience on designing, implementation Data processing solutions. Excellent in Programming languages like Python, Java, Scala, etc. and Programming basics - Data Structures; Strong knowledge on RDBMS Expertise in following AWS services (or equivalent services in Azure, GCP) is preferred. Good to have cloud warehousing solutions knowledge like Snowflake; Experience with dataflow and workflow tools like Apache Nifi, Apache Airflow Experience in designing and driving delivery of mid-large-scale solutions on Cloud platforms. Good handle on working in distributed computing and cloud services platform - AWS, Azure, GCP. Strong client presence. Ability to communicate verbally and in writing technical concepts to all audiences; Ability to manage a virtual global team environment that contributes to the overall timely delivery of multiple projects; Knowledge of current data modeling, and data warehouse concepts, issues, practices, methodologies, and trends in the Business Intelligence domain; Experience with analyzing and troubleshooting the interaction between databases, operating systems, and applications; Significant supervisory, coaching and hands-on project management skills; Willingness to travel to other global offices as needed to work with client or other internal project teams. Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: Associate - TAC We seek TAC Associates to join our WTC office in Pune, India. TAC Associates handle 1st level support calls/emails/chats from ZS offices worldwide in a user environment consisting of PC/MAC running the standard suite of business applications. What you'll do: Associate - TAC in the Enterprise will… Troubleshooting IT-related issues for a user population of ZS employees and clients using ZS proprietary software via telephone and remote access. Provide L1 Technical Support for the Windows/MAC machines, printer ZS proprietary software. Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to operating systems, applications, and hardware Familiarity with basic networking concepts and protocols. Common query topics include - VPN, Outlook (and other O365 Apps and Services), Active Directory and Exchange, Network Connectivity, Software Installation (using SCCM and Privilege Management), File Server and File Share access, FTP, Application specific issues, Intune Support & Management etc. Handling administrative tasks such as tracking TAC calls/chats, timely follow up of all assigned tickets in your bin until closure, re-assigning tickets to the relevant L2 teams and following up via emails as required, assisting with organizational efforts, maintaining chargebacks for licensed software etc Additional TAC projects/tasks as assigned based on performance.
qualifications: What you’ll bring: Bachelor's degree required, Master's degree desirable 1-2 years of relevant experience in Customer Support, or preferably IT Helpdesk / Service Desk Strong customer service orientation Professional appearance and demeanor, with ability to exercise good judgment and discretion Ability to work varied hours, enabling support in a 24/7 environment A+ certification or Microsoft Certified Systems Administrator (desirable, not mandatory) Experience with Service Now tool (desirable, not mandatory) Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: ServiceNow Developer / Administrator We are seeking a skilled ServiceNow Developer to design, develop, and enhance solutions on the ServiceNow platform. This role involves configuring out-of-the-box modules, developing custom applications, and integrating ServiceNow with enterprise systems to support business workflows and drive digital transformation initiatives. What you'll do: ServiceNow Developer / Administrator in the Enterprise will… Administer, configure, and support the ServiceNow platform across ITSM, CSM and other aligned modules Implement and enhance ITSM processes such as Incident, Problem, Change, Request, and Knowledge Management Develop and maintain custom applications using ServiceNow App Engine Design, develop, and maintain ServiceNow solutions using: Business Rules, Client Scripts, UI Policies. Script Includes, Flow Designer, and Catalog Items Implement workflows and automations to improve service efficiency and reduce manual effort Support platform upgrades, patching, and release management activities Develop and manage integrations using REST/SOAP APIs, IntegrationHub, and MID Servers Enable self‑service capabilities leveraging Now Assist, Virtual Agent and Knowledge Management Support CMDB and Asset Management processes, ensuring data quality and CSDM alignment Troubleshoot and resolve platform issues and perform root cause analysis Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and deliver scalable solutions Maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and knowledge articles Ensure platform security, performance, and adherence to governance and best practices Own platform architecture, customization strategy, and overall solution design Review and approve technical designs, scripts, and integration patterns Define and enforce coding standards, best practices, and governance
qualifications: What you’ll bring: 5–8+ years of overall IT experience with 3–5+ years on ServiceNow development Advanced expertise in server-side and client-side scripting, performance optimization, and debugging Proficiency in JavaScript, Glide API, and ServiceNow scripting Solid understanding of ITIL and IT Service Management processes Experience with Flow Designer, Integration Hub, and Virtual Agent Working experience with ServiceNow upgrades and release cycles Knowledge of integrations, authentication methods, and APIs Experience designing scalable automations and reusable components Familiarity with CMDB concepts, Discovery, and service mapping (preferred) Fluency in English Client-first mentality Intense work ethic Collaborative spirit and problem-solving approach

description: description
responsibilities: We are seeking a high-impact Senior Executive – Digital & Technology Innovation to lead the digital transformation and innovation agenda within our consulting practice. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, technology, and business growth, with full accountability for driving measurable client impact, building new technology-led businesses, and growing high-performing leadership teams. As a Technology Partner, you will act as a trusted advisor to C‑suite and enterprise leaders at global pharma and healthcare organizations, while also serving as a builder—establishing innovation ecosystems, incubating next-generation digital capabilities, and scaling them across clients and industries. The ideal candidate combines deep technical acumen with strong consulting experience and has successfully led innovation functions, client transformation programs, or digital solution incubators. What You'll Do - Business Growth & Client Leadership - Drive business expansion within key clients, identifying and unlocking new revenue streams Serve as a strategic advisor to senior client stakeholders, navigating complex business challenges and positioning ZS’s technology solutions effectively Lead business development efforts by proactively identifying opportunities, crafting proposals with the team, and securing multi-million-dollar engagements Establish deep client relationships, acting as a trusted partner and thought leader in technology transformation Delivery Excellence for clients - Oversee the design and implementation of large-scale technology solutions, ensuring alignment with business objectives Provide guidance on solution architecture, data strategy, and AI-driven automation to enhance client capabilities People Leadership - Build and scale high-performing teams, mentoring and coaching managers and associates to grow into leadership roles Cultivate a culture of continuous learning and professional development, enabling team members to upskill in advanced technologies Delivery Excellence Process - Drive the vision, strategy, and execution of Delivery excellence for various delivery models Create a culture of delivery excellence. Delivery discipline should be integral part of client delivery Ensure governance, risk management, delivery discipline across client accounts. What You'll Bring - 20+ years of experience in digital technology, data & analytics, and management consulting, with a strong record of leading large-scale global engagements for healthcare and life sciences clients, including biopharma, medtech, and healthcare services organizations. Professional certifications in cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP), Agile, Design Thinking, or Innovation Management (e.g., IDEO, Stanford d.school) are a plus. Demonstrated expertise in digital transformation, enterprise architecture, and data & analytics, with the ability to design and implement cloud-native data, analytics, and AI ecosystems, including modern data platforms, advanced analytics, MLOps/LLMOps, and responsible AI governance.
